Uses of Interface
com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.domain.ParticipantFaultStrategy

Packages that use ParticipantFaultStrategy
Package
Description
com.distributed2pc.participant.config
 
com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure
 

  • Uses of ParticipantFaultStrategy in com.distributed2pc.participant.config

    Methods in com.distributed2pc.participant.config that return types with arguments of type ParticipantFaultStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<FaultType,ParticipantFaultStrategy>
    ParticipantConfig.faultStrategies(CrashFaultStrategy crash, NetworkDelayFaultStrategy networkDelay, ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy forceAbortVote, TransientFaultStrategy transientFault, IntermittentFaultStrategy intermittent)
    Builds the fault strategy map keyed by FaultType.

  • Uses of ParticipantFaultStrategy in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure

    Classes in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure that implement ParticipantFaultStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CrashFaultStrategy
    CRASH fault strategy: when active, the node returns HTTP 503 to all incoming requests.
    class 
    ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy
    FORCE_ABORT_VOTE fault strategy: forces the participant to vote NO on the next N prepare requests.
    class 
    IntermittentFaultStrategy
    Fault strategy that simulates intermittent failures: once activated the node randomly rejects requests with a configurable probability.
    class 
    NetworkDelayFaultStrategy
    NETWORK_DELAY fault strategy: adds configurable latency to every outbound response.
    class 
    TransientFaultStrategy
    Fault strategy that simulates a transient failure: the node appears crashed for a configurable duration and then automatically recovers.
